Add a marginal median marker layer

layer_marginal_median.Rd

Displays the coordinate-wise median of voter ideal points as a labelled upward-pointing filled triangle, matching the competition-canvas overlay (issue-by-issue median voter; Black 1948). Computed via marginal_median_2d.

Usage

layer_marginal_median(
  fig,
  voters,
  color = NULL,
  name = "Marginal Median",
  theme = "dark2"
)

Arguments

fig

A plotly figure from plot_spatial_voting.

voters

Flat numeric vector [x0, y0, ...] of voter ideal coordinates.

color

Marker fill colour. NULL uses the canvas-matched indigo-violet (or grayscale when theme = "bw"). Outline uses a light stroke for contrast, as on the canvas.

name

Legend entry label.

theme

Colour theme — see plot_spatial_voting.

Value

The updated plotly figure.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
voters <- c(-1.0, -0.5, 0.0, 0.0, 0.8, 0.6)
fig <- plot_spatial_voting(voters)
fig <- layer_marginal_median(fig, voters)
fig
} # }
